description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout with large floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for abundant natural light. The exterior is clad in horizontal wood paneling, complemented by white window frames and railings. A prominent outdoor deck area includes a swimming pool and a hot tub, with a green terrace and outdoor seating visible. The interior is divided into several rooms, including a kitchen, living area, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all furnished in a contemporary style. There are multiple access points, including a main entrance with steps and sliding glass doors leading to the deck. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, with seamless transitions between interior spaces and exterior amenities.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with extensive glass windows, wood paneling, and a large outdoor deck featuring a pool and hot tub. The design highlights open-plan living and strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main deck, pool, hot tub, and large glass windows with visible interior rooms and outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bungalow, multiple window arrangements, and the continuation of the deck and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with grouped windows, a secondary entrance, and the overall rectangular structure.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the staircase to the deck, the hot tub, and the integration of the green terrace with the main living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
